SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor

Interface EntityAttribute

All Known Subinterfaces:
RelAttribute
All Known Implementing Classes:
EntityAttributeImpl, RelAttributeImpl
public interface EntityAttribute
Interface to represent the metadata of an entity attribute.

An attribute of a jpa entity can have multiple properties. For example, it can be a primary key, or it can be a versionable column, or it can be an enum, or it can be a transient property, etc. All these metadata information is captured in this class.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    check()
    Return the check constraint of this column.
    String
    column()
    Return the name of the table column this attribute is associated with.
    Class<?>
    datatype()
    Return the java type of the attribute.
    jakarta.persistence.EnumType
    enumType()
    Return the enumerated type.
    jakarta.persistence.GenerationType
    generationType()
    Return the auto generated type.
    boolean
    isAutoGenerated()
    Indicate whether the value of the id attribute(s) will be auto generated by the database provider.
    boolean

    Indicate if the attribute is an Enum type.
    boolean
    isId()
    Indicates whether this attribute is an id column.
    boolean
    isTransient()
    Indicates whether this entity attribute is of transient type.
    boolean
    isVersion()
    Indicates whether this attribute is an versionable column.
    int
    length()

    name()
    Return the name of the entity attribute.

  • Method Details

    • name

      String name()
      Return the name of the entity attribute.
      Returns:
      String

    • datatype

      Class<?> datatype()
      Return the java type of the attribute.
      Returns:
      Class

    • column

      String column()
      Return the name of the table column this attribute is associated with. The attribute will be annotated with Column to represent the underlying table column it is associated to. If no such annotation is present and the attribute/field is not marked as Transient, then the name of the field will be treated as the column name.
      Returns:
      String

    • isId

      boolean isId()
      Indicates whether this attribute is an id column. An attribute will be an id column, if it has the annotation Id.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • isAutoGenerated

      boolean isAutoGenerated()
      Indicate whether the value of the id attribute(s) will be auto generated by the database provider.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • generationType

      jakarta.persistence.GenerationType generationType()
      Return the auto generated type.
      Returns:
      GenerationType

    • updatable

      boolean updatable()
      Verify if this column is updatable. Any updatable column would be skipped during a database update operation.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • nullable

      boolean nullable()
      Verify if this column is nullable.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • check

      String check()
      Return the check constraint of this column.
      Returns:
      String

    • length

      int length()
      Return the column length.
      Returns:
      int

    • isVersion

      boolean isVersion()
      Indicates whether this attribute is an versionable column. An attribute will be an id column, if it has the annotation Version. A version column is primarily a numeric column, where it will be auto-incremented every time the entry changes. It will be injected automatically by the framework.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • isTransient

      boolean isTransient()
      Indicates whether this entity attribute is of transient type. A Transient attribute will never be persisted. Hence while generating the insert query, this attribute will be skipped.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • isEnum

      boolean isEnum()
      Indicate if the attribute is an Enum type. JPA LiTE supports handling enum data type. A java enum type will be translated either into a String or an Integer depending on the option chosen while modelling the Entity class.
      Returns:
      boolean

    • enumType

      jakarta.persistence.EnumType enumType()
      Return the enumerated type.
      Returns:
      EnumType
